observed.statement: implementation uses strict comparison at the start boundary

inferred.statement: records dated exactly on start are omitted

impact_map: report request -> inclusive filter -> returned row set

invariants.statement: a closed date interval includes records equal to start and end and excludes immediate neighbors

risks.statement: start-boundary record -> strict comparison omits valid data -> incomplete report

scenarios.title: closed interval boundary partition
preconditions: rows exist before, at start, inside, at end, and after
expected: start, middle, and end returned in input order

findings.statement: the implementation excludes the documented inclusive start boundary
findings.next_action: apply expected/fix.patch and rerun existing plus regression tests

residual_risks.statement: timezone-aware datetime behavior is outside this date-only fixture
residual_risks.treatment: add a separate timezone scenario if production accepts datetimes

findings: failure is reproducible and classification follows source plus execution evidence

basis: high-severity regression test fails on the documented boundary
